text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what's going on?! What's this blazing power
igniting inside me?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
WHOOOA! It's like I'm overflowing! No, I'm
boiling! Magma is bubbling up inside of me!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait for my next big race! It's gonna be
flaming red-hot, I just know it!
